creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 193410
py-django-ldapdb-1.0.0.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch from svn that updates www/py-django-ldapdb to 1.0.0.

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/django-ldapdb/django-ldapdb/compare/v0.3.2...1.0.0

Changes to the port:
- changed RUN_DEPENDS (assigned to Django 1.11)
- made COMMENT a bit more specific
- enabled for Python 2 + 3
- added NO_ARCH
- added LICENSE_FILE
- added DOCS option with the appropriate settings
- updated WWW
- reformatted pkg-descr

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
